name: GeneralOpeningElement
summary: Representation of (polygonal) niche, recess, slit or opening.

constructors.name: GeneralOpeningElement( wallOpeningProp: GeneralOpeningProperties, generalEle: BaseElementAdapter, startPnt: Point2D, endPnt: Point2D, drawPlacementPreview: bool, )
constructors.signature: GeneralOpeningElement( wallOpeningProp: GeneralOpeningProperties, generalEle: BaseElementAdapter, startPnt: Point2D, endPnt: Point2D, drawPlacementPreview: bool, )
constructors.summary: Construct a regular niche, recess, slit or opening by start and end point
constructors.remarks: Construct a regular niche, recess, slit or opening by start and end point

params.name: generalEle
params.doc: General element which includes the opening

params.name: drawPlacementPreview
params.doc: Set to True to draw preview before the opening is placed in an architectural component (no general element adaption). Set to False after the opening is placed in an opening.

constructors.name: GeneralOpeningElement( wallOpeningProp: GeneralOpeningProperties, generalEle: BaseElementAdapter, groundPlanePolygon: Polygon2D, drawPlacementPreview: bool, )
constructors.signature: GeneralOpeningElement( wallOpeningProp: GeneralOpeningProperties, generalEle: BaseElementAdapter, groundPlanePolygon: Polygon2D, drawPlacementPreview: bool, )
constructors.summary: Construct a polygonal niche, recess, slit or opening
constructors.remarks: Construct a polygonal niche, recess, slit or opening

params.name: generalEle
params.doc: General element which includes the opening

params.name: drawPlacementPreview
params.doc: Set to True to draw preview before the opening is placed in an architectural component (no general element adaption). Set to False after the opening is placed in an opening.
